pillar.reference: Feng Rui 2005 restoration model, suspended pendulum principle, Houfeng Didongyi AD 132

copper.description: Bronze alloy, Zhangheng Didongyi material, elastic damping 1e-3, structural 0.02-0.04
copper.reference: Experimental metal damping data: polycrystalline copper ~1e-3, joined structures 0.02-0.04

iron.description: Wrought iron, higher strength, elastic damping 1-3e-4, joined structures 0.03-0.07
iron.reference: Experimental iron damping: pure Fe 1-3e-4, bolted/riveted structures 0.03-0.07

wood.reference: Timber structure damping: GLT joints 0.08-0.22, elastic range 0.03-0.04

steel.description: Modern structural steel, high strength low damping, welded 0.01-0.02, bolted 0.03-0.05
steel.reference: Steel damping: elastic <0.01%, continuous welded 0.01-0.02, bolted joints 0.03-0.05

didongyi.description: Zhangheng Houfeng Didongyi (AD 132), Feng Rui 2005 restoration, suspended pendulum, 1.8m tall pillar φ12cm, T0=1.67-2s
didongyi.reference: Feng Rui et al., 'The scientific reconstruction of Zhangheng's seismoscope', 2005, Acta Seismologica Sinica; Longxi earthquake AD 138, ~499km epicentral distance, threshold ~1.8gal

water_clock_armillary.description: Su Song Water-powered Armillary Sphere Tower (AD 1088), astronomical clock NOT seismometer, 12m tall, 7m wide, 20000jin copper, Tianheng escapement

modern_seismometer.description: Modern broadband electronic seismometer with pre-amplification, typical observatory grade
modern_seismometer.reference: USGS/IRIS GS-13 or Streckeisen STS-2 class broadband seismometer

time_sync.reference: IEEE 1588 PTP, NTP RFC 5905, typical crystal oscillator ±20ppm = ~1.7s/day drift

earthquake_wave.reference: Kanai-Tajimi power spectral density model; El Centro Imperial Valley 1940 M6.9, first complete strong-motion record
